result.stdout:
Usage: Ulid.Cli [options...]

Options:
  -t, -timestamp <String>           timestamp(converted to UTC, ISO8601 format recommended) (Default: null)
  -r, -randomness <String>          randomness bytes(formatted as Base32, must be 16 characters, case insensitive) (Default: null)
  -b, -base64 <Boolean>             output as base64 format, or output base32 if false (Default: False)
  -min, -minRandomness <Boolean>    min-randomness(use 000...) (Default: False)
  -max, -maxRandomness <Boolean>    max-randomness(use ZZZ...) (Default: False)

commands.payload:
Usage: Ulid.Cli [options...]

Options:
  -t, -timestamp <String>           timestamp(converted to UTC, ISO8601 format recommended) (Default: null)
  -r, -randomness <String>          randomness bytes(formatted as Base32, must be 16 characters, case insensitive) (Default: null)
  -b, -base64 <Boolean>             output as base64 format, or output base32 if false (Default: False)
  -min, -minRandomness <Boolean>    min-randomness(use 000...) (Default: False)
  -max, -maxRandomness <Boolean>    max-randomness(use ZZZ...) (Default: False)
